sharedEntities.description: Core loan entity that flows from infrastructure provisioning to testing and account resolution
Account mappings for loans that are created by data-utils and validated in e2e tests
Configuration for accounts used for various financial operations

dataFlows.name: Infrastructure Provisioning to Testing
dataFlows.description: AWS resources provisioned by IaC are used by E2E tests to verify functionality
steps: Run E2E tests against provisioned infrastructure

dataFlows.name: Account Resolution Flow
dataFlows.description: Account mapping data flows from data-utils to databases provisioned in IaC
steps: Fetch account data via accounting API
Resolve correct accounts based on loan attributes
Update account mappings in Selling DB

integrationPoints.description: E2E tests utilize the Aurora PostgreSQL databases provisioned by IaC
Data-utils service reads from and writes to the databases provisioned by IaC
E2E tests validate the account mappings created by the data-utils service

patterns.description: Declarative provisioning of AWS resources using Terragrunt for multiple environments
Simulates real-world scenarios and external dependencies for comprehensive testing
Maps and resolves account information from different data sources

ambiguities: In iac-cos-lending-selling, the relationship between AI-API service and its DynamoDB tables isn't clearly defined
In cos-lending-selling-e2e-tests, the exact relationship between the SQS Payment Queue and the web-api service needs clarification
In cos-lending-selling-data-utils, the specific rules for CustomPurchaseAccountMapping aren't defined
